description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of gray and white wall panels, large glass windows, and wooden accents, giving it a contemporary urban appearance. The front of the house includes a spacious wooden deck, landscaped with flower beds and surrounded by several mature trees. A driveway leads to a carport on the side, with a car parked on striped paving stones. The upper floor is partially open, revealing a minimalist interior layout with open-plan living spaces and modern furnishings. The house is surrounded by greenery, providing a balance between urban living and natural elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, wooden deck, and a carport, surrounded by trees and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the open upper floor, interior layout, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main entrance, wooden deck, flower beds, and large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the carport, driveway, and a more solid wall with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Side view showing the driveway, carport, and a mix of window placements with visible landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, steps leading to a wooden deck, and landscaped flower beds without overhangs or columns.
